definition_pt: A Nutricao do Estilo de Vida e uma abordagem dietetico-comportamental baseada em evidencias que integra padroes alimentares saudaveis, composicao nutricional, grau de processamento, habilidades culinarias, literacia alimentar, comensalidade, ambiente alimentar, adesao e modificadores clinicos para orientar o cuidado nutricional de adultos com obesidade e/ou risco cardiometabolico no contexto da Medicina do Estilo de Vida.
definition_en: Lifestyle Nutrition is an evidence-based dietary-behavioral approach integrating healthy dietary patterns, nutritional composition, food processing, culinary skills, food literacy, commensality, food environment, adherence and clinical modifiers to guide nutritional care in adults with obesity and/or cardiometabolic risk within Lifestyle Medicine.
core_assumption: Dietary care in Lifestyle Medicine requires more than nutrient prescription; it must integrate context, behavior, competence and adherence.
theory_of_change: If evidence-based dietary guidance is translated into behaviorally feasible protocol components and validated through human review, then adults with obesity and cardiometabolic risk can receive more coherent, auditable and implementable nutrition care.

scope.population: Adults with obesity and/or cardiometabolic risk
scope.clinical_focus: Obesity, diabetes, hypertension, dyslipidemia, cardiovascular risk and metabolic syndrome

scientific_gap: Dietary guidelines, clinical society documents and diet-pattern evidence are fragmented and rarely translated into a unified Lifestyle Nutrition protocol with behavioral implementation and audit trail.
originality_claim: NutEV proposes an integrated evidence-to-protocol architecture linking documents, claims, quality, convergence, human review and protocol readiness.
relationship_to_lifestyle_medicine: NutEV operationalizes the nutrition pillar of Lifestyle Medicine as a protocol and evidence governance system.
relationship_to_existing_diets: NutEV does not replace established dietary patterns; it translates convergent evidence from them into implementable protocol components.
relationship_to_behavioral_nutrition: NutEV integrates behavioral competence, adherence, context and contingency-aware application as protocol dimensions.
